query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='course_evaluations' AND TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%highlight%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%suggest%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%improvement%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%development%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%dimension%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%resource%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%text%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3KaHfo5jCyZ9SjS.root --database E5ZvUqwRaQqRfRQJY2QbxS --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='course_evaluations' AND TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%highlight%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%suggest%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%improvement%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%development%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%dimension%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%resource%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%text%');
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME

score_feedback_improvement
